text:
Created attachment 244222
devel/matreshka: Restore and update to 21.0

Restore Matreshka Project, partially, the i386 build is running out of stack space and failing. {12.4,13.2,14}-amd64 passed poudriere-testport.

* port{clippy,fmt,lint} maintenance
* switch to new home https://github.com/godunko/matreshka
* update to 21.0
